messages.text: You swing the underhum knell into {target} and the head tolls a note too low to hear, a standing tone that rings through their bones before the weight of it ever lands. Your strike {verb} them!
{source} swings the underhum knell into you and a struck-bell cold rings up through your marrow, the note arriving a heartbeat ahead of the blow. The strike {verb} you!
{source} swings the underhum knell into {target}, and a single unhearable note rolls out through the cold as it lands, felt in the teeth of everyone near.
You bring the underhum knell down at {target} and it tolls its low note against nothing, the standing tone fraying into the cold air.
{source} brings the underhum knell down at you and the ringing weight sweeps past, its unheard note shivering the frost where you stood.
{source} brings the underhum knell down at {target} and the tolling head finds only air, its note guttering into silence.

You drive the underhum knell home and the whole standing tone of the source pours through the stroke at once, ringing {target} against themselves until something inside them cracks on the note! Your strike {verb} them!
{source} drives the underhum knell home and the note swallows you whole, the cold ringing your marrow against itself until your own body answers the tone and gives! The strike {verb} you!
{source} drives the underhum knell into {target}, and the note deepens to a toll that stands in the cold long after the blow, as if the source itself had answered.
